TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Aziya, title = Aziya, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aziya} }

S.FORM: Aziya ru Asyuw hya' ga syuw na hiyal. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 44,579,000 sq km (maki' tay 1ginkgan kin wahci') Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 126,702,133. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Asia CIA world factbook Asia Encyclop√¶dia Britannica

Aziya ru Asyuw hya' ga syuw na hiyal. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 44,579,000 sq km (maki' tay 1ginkgan kin wahci') Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 126,702,133. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Asia CIA world factbook Asia Encyclop√¶dia Britannica
S.PHON: azija ru as~…ïjuw ƒßja î …£a s~…ïjuw na ƒßijal. kwara î ki≈ãƒß ¶~ ®ijan nija î **,***,*** s~…ïq km (maki î taj *…£ink…£an kin waƒß ¶~ ®i î) kinkƒßmajan kwara î s~…ïquliq ƒßja î …£a ***,***,***. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î as~…ïia ¶~ ®ia worl* *a ¶~ ®tŒ≤ook as~…ïia en ¶~ ®j ¶~ ®lop**ia Œ≤ritanni ¶~ ®a
